programmer_notes: SignedRefs binds node_id + sorted refs + Ed25519 sig over canonical bytes of both (tamper-evident; cannot reattribute to another namespace). read_git_refs via gitops.run_git for-each-ref; namespaced() => refs/namespaces/<nid>/<ref>. New: src/gither/sigrefs.py, tests/test_sigrefs.py (8 tests incl. git-integration), 'gither sigrefs' CLI. 44 tests total.
summary: add signed refs (verifiable per-peer ref publication)
why: P2P layer 3: in a server-free network a relay cannot be trusted about another peer's branches. Signing each peer's {refname: oid} set under its namespace makes ref exchange tamper-evident and non-reattributable. Modeled on Radicle rad/sigrefs; builds on gither.peer + gither.identity.
